profile.name: Kuyheng Thoeng
profile.bio: I build fast, accessible web apps with modern React and reliable APIs. I care about clean UX, performance, and maintainable code that scales with the team.

about.title: Curious builder focused on outcomes
about.subtitle: I care about clear UX, reliable APIs, and measurable impact for the teams I support.
highlights: Built and shipped production web apps with Next.js and Node.js
Improved dashboard load time from 3.1s to 1.2s through UI and API tuning
Designed a reusable UI kit used across 12+ screens

strengths.title: Frontend craft
strengths.description: Polished UI, micro-interactions, and accessibility with modern React.

strengths.title: Backend reliability
strengths.description: Clean APIs, solid data modeling, and thoughtful error handling.

strengths.title: Product sense
strengths.description: I ask the right questions to ship what users actually need.

timeline.label: Now
timeline.title: Building web apps and dashboards
timeline.detail: Focused on speed, clarity, and maintainable systems.

timeline.label: Previously
